news.t: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
VanEck Announces Yearend Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs

holdings.infoBox: MOTG is an equity ETF with a total of 81 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 3.04%, Etsy, Inc. at 2.68%, Ambev at 2.34%, U.S. Bancorp at 2.26%, and NVIDIA at 2.21%.

overview.description: The VanEck Morningstar Global Wide Moat ETF (MOTG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Morningstar Global Wide Moat Focus index. The fund tracks a staggered, equal-weighted index of companies that Morningstar determines to have the highest fair value among firms with a sustainable competitive advantage. MOTG was launched on Oct 30, 2021 and is issued by VanEck.
infoTable: Morningstar Global Wide Moat Focus Index

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: VanEck Announces Yearend Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the following 2022 annual distributions per share for its VanEck® equity exchange-traded funds.
